milestones.step: Scaffolded backend, frontend, migrations, docs, and orchestration for the TrainingOps foundation.
Implemented booking, content upload/versioning, task DAG/version checks, and tenant-aware API routes.
Built high-fidelity role-based dashboards with heatmap, calendar, previewers, drag ordering, and hold timers.
Added ingestion bot shims, analytics aggregates, audit/reporting helpers, functional tests, and offline test runner.
